9829738831.name: Racer Vs Police AI
9829738831.description:
Experience an intense POLICE CHASE. Each round, one player is randomly chosen as the racer, and the rest play as cops with the help of AI police. 

🚗 RACER: Run from AI police. Complete 3 tasks before time runs out.
🚓 COPS: Work together to trap and arrest the suspect.

⚠️ The more damage you cause in the city, the more relentless the cops become!
⭐ Earn coins by playing to unlock new vehicles and customize your ride for style and performance.

🎮 Controls:
Ability - Q / ButtonY
Nitro - LSHIFT / ButtonB
Handbrake - SPACE / ButtonA

Private server owners have admin.
9829738831.creator: R_obotz
